extract: Focus Blast (Japanese: きあいだま Fighting Spirit Bullet) is a damage-dealing Fighting-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM52 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR64 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM158 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM102 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
